user.title: Samsung SmartTags Setup
user.description:
Visit [SmartThings Find]({url}) and log in with your Samsung account.

1. Open Developer Tools in your browser (F12).
2. Navigate to the Application/Storage tab.
3. Copy the **JSESSIONID** value.

*Note: Make sure to copy the one from `smartthingsfind.samsung.com` (you might have others from different domains).* 

Paste your token below:

init.title: Update JSESSIONID
init.description:
If your session has expired or you are experiencing connection problems, you can update your token here.

Visit [SmartThings Find]({url}) and log in with your Samsung account.

1. Open Developer Tools in your browser (F12).
2. Navigate to the Application/Storage tab.
3. Copy the **JSESSIONID** value.

*Note: Make sure to copy the one from `smartthingsfind.samsung.com`.*
